execSummary.narrative: 5 months of FY2026 Service activity reported, $2.17M invoiced YTD. Run-rate annualizes to $5.22M against the $6.8M plan, a $1.58M shortfall (23.3% uplift needed).

actionableRecommendations: Annualized Service pace is $1.58M short of the $6.8M plan. 23.3% uplift needed on remaining months.
